channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
item.description: The deals come as the DoD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.

item.title: Test Nakamura Crosscity+ : la meilleure affaire du moment pour transporter vos enfants à vélo cargo électrique ?
item.description: Vélo cargo électrique compact et relativement léger, le Nakamura Crosscity+ n’a certes pas les capacités d’un longtail mais propose un bon équipement et un moteur central performant.

item.title: Finally, Windows 11 desktop PC users can enjoy Xbox Mode — and Microsoft has a new gift for Ally X users
item.description: Microsoft isn't resting on its laurels with Windows 11 gaming optimization, with Xbox Mode now being rolled out to desktop PC users.

item.title: Gemini remplace Google Assistant dans 4 millions de voitures GM et arrive bientôt chez Renault, Volvo et Polestar
item.description: Google fait passer ses voitures avec Google built-in de l'Assistant à Gemini. Le déploiement commence aux États-Unis, en anglais, et touche déjà 4 millions de véhicules GM. La France ? On verra plus tard.

item.title: Free-to-play mobile game The Division Resurgence is launching on PC in August as Ubisoft shares new roadmap details, but you can play it right now
item.description: Ubisoft has shared the content roadmap for its free-to-play mobile game The Division Resurgence, along with a release window for the PC version.

item.title: La Tapo C720 prend toute la lumière pendant ces French Days avec une promotion de 23 % chez Amazon
item.description: La Tapo C720 profite des French Days pour perdre 40 euros sur Amazon. Une promotion qui se chiffre à 45 euros pour les membres Prime grâce au code PRIME15.

item.title: Someone found a Chinese retailer selling super-cheap CRT TVs, but don't get too excited, retro gaming fans — every new piece of information about them seems to reveal more mysteries
item.description: A Chinese company is offering newly made CRT TVs —but with some debate over exactly what's being sold

item.title: FBI says hackers are making millions from stolen cargo - losses 'surged' to nearly $725 million in 2025
item.description: Cybercriminals are infiltrating digital shipping supply chains to reroute cargo and use it to fund other crimes.

item.title: Amazon Web Services, Microsoft and NVIDIA will provide AI tech to Pentagon
item.description: They join Google, OpenAI and xAI.

item.title: Concilier technologie et BTP : voici le pari du cursus Bâtiment Numérique d’Ynov Campus [Sponso]
item.description: Décarboner le BTP grâce au numérique : voici les enjeux du cursus Bâtiment Numérique de l’école Ynov Campus, de Bac+3 à Bac+5.

item.title: Aurzen’s tiny trifold projector is almost 40 percent off right now
item.description: Not all trifolds are created equal — just ask our own Allison Johnson, who recently spent time with Samsung’s ill-fated Galaxy phone. Aurzen’s Zip projector is the kind of trifold gadget we can fully get behind, though, and it’s currently on sale at Amazon for $259.99 ($140 off). You can also pick it up in […]

item.title: Ubuntu services hit by outages after DDoS attack
item.description: A group of hacktivists have claimed responsibility for a distributed denial-of-service attack, which has affected several Ubuntu and Canonical websites, and prevented users from updating the Linux-based operating system.

item.title: You Found Satoshi? Let’s See the Receipts
item.description: Two new projects, including one from a Pulitzer-winning reporter, claim they’ve solved the mystery of Bitcoin’s creator. So why does the hunt continue?

item.title: J’ai testé le Nuki Keypad 2 NFC : quand mon smartphone se prend pour une clé
item.description: Leader européen des serrures connectées, Nuki a tardé à proposer un clavier numérique NFC compatible avec ses serrures. Mais voici le Nuki Keypad 2 NFC que nous avons testé : véritable révolution ou simple argument marketing ?

item.title: Essence pas chère : les meilleurs comparateurs de prix carburant à utiliser en France
item.description: Le gazole a dépassé 2,20 €/L fin mars, du jamais-vu depuis 1985. Et entre deux stations distantes de cinq kilomètres, l'écart peut atteindre 25 centimes par litre, soit 12 à 15 euros sur un plein. Voici les outils que l'on vous conseille pour trouver le bon prix au bon endroit, sans tourner pendant une heure.

item.title: 7 ways AI is being used at work by everyone from teachers to marketing professionals
item.description: People in a wide range of fields are using AI for things like lesson plans and deciphering industry jargon. Artificial intelligence is permeating workplaces, changing the nature of jobs of every stripe.Teachers are using it to create lesson plans and grade papers. Marketing professionals are harnessing it to work a room and learn about the needs of potential clients. Product managers are asking AI to serve as an interpreter when technical conversations went over their heads in meetings.Some people who employ AI tools are concerned that widespread use of the technology could erode critical thin...

item.title: Apple is overhauling its Photos app with AI — because it has to
item.description: Apple’s upcoming AI photo tools are less about innovation for its own sake and more about catching up in a space where competitors have already reset expectations

item.title: Error in Medicare database exposes US healthcare providers Social Security numbers – Trump administration directory designed to modernize Medicare encounters another setback
item.description: A Trump administration directory designed to help seniors find healthcare inadvertently exposed Social Security numbers.

item.title: Some of Xteink’s credit card-sized e-readers are losing their best feature
item.description: The Xteink X4 and X3 are excellent alternatives to Kindles and Kobos if you want an e-reader that's as easy to slip into your pocket - just not out of the box. Both devices come with stock firmware that's clunky, limited, and occasionally confusing, but that can be easily fixed by plugging them into a […]

item.title: Engadget Podcast: Is the Valve Steam Controller worth $100?
item.description: And why it's not exactly a PC gamepad.

item.title: Pentagon strikes classified AI deals with OpenAI, Google, and Nvidia — but not Anthropic
item.description: The Pentagon has struck deals with OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Nvidia, Elon Musk's xAI, and the startup Reflection, allowing the agency to use their AI tools in classified settings, according to an announcement on Friday. At the same time, the Defense Department has left out Anthropic - which it previously used for classified information - […]...

item.title: The Verge’s 2026 Mother’s Day gift guide
item.description: Whether it's managing a busy home or looking out for everyone around them, moms spend a lot of time every day caring for others. Mother's Day, May 10th, is an opportunity to return the favor, so we've rounded up practical gadgets and little luxuries that can lighten her load. This year's picks are designed to […]

item.title: From 'encryption backdoor' to 'lawful access' — is a compromise between privacy, security, and law enforcement needs actually possible?
item.description: After ongoing attempts in Europe, Canada is the latest country pushing for "lawful access" to data for law enforcement. This, despite cybersecurity experts warning that breaking encryption would threaten everyone's privacy and security.

item.title: YouTube : comment Google a réussi à transformer votre haine des pubs en mine d’or
item.description: YouTube Premium semble gagner son bras de fer contre les bloqueurs de publicités. Les derniers résultats financiers de Google montrent une accélération sans précédent du nombre d'abonnés payants.
